text.title: javascript Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to scaffold a strict TS project.

step.name: bootstrap
step.decision-gate: If team is on npm/yarn, run [[pnpm-package-management]] migration first.

step.name: tsconfig-strict
step.action: Drop in tsconfig.json; verify strict + noUncheckedIndexedAccess + exactOptionalPropertyTypes are on.
step.decision-gate: If existing code has many `any`s, plan an iterative migration before enabling exactOptionalPropertyTypes.

step.name: lint-and-format
step.action: Add ESLint 9 flat config with @typescript-eslint and the no-explicit-any rule; add Prettier.
step.decision-gate: Run `pnpm lint` once; expect failures that the team will fix before merging the methodology adoption PR.

step.name: test-stack
step.action: Add Vitest + jsdom; create `src/test/setup.ts` and `src/test/handlers.ts` for MSW.
step.output: vitest.config.ts + test setup files + one example test.
step.decision-gate: If repo has Jest already, plan migration in a follow-up PR.

step.name: ci
step.action: Add steps: `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm test`.
step.decision-gate: Block merge on any of typecheck/lint/test failure.
